confirmed.note: 15+ unary math wrappers (EvalLn/Log10/Exp/Sqrt/Floor/Ceil/Sin/Cos/Tan/Asin/Acos/Atan/Sinh/Cosh...) mechanically copy-pasted: identical body, only the std:: call name changed per function

two recursive AST walkers WalkExprIdents/WalkStmtIdents and CollectMemberAccess/CollectMemberAccessInStmt share identical 'if(!e)return; if(e->kind==X){out.push_back(e);} <recurse all child fields>' skeleton, only the matched ExprKind differs

false_positives.what_happened: every system-call handler shares the same fixed signature 'static Logic4Vec EvalX(const Expr* expr, SimContext& ctx, Arena& arena)' plus a uniform guard prologue ('if (expr->args.empty()/size()<N) return MakeLogic4VecVal(arena, W, V); int fd=FdFromArg(...); FILE* fp=ctx.GetFileHandle(fd); if(!fp) return ...'). The bodies genuinely diverge (fgetc vs fseek vs ferror), but a token-window detector flags the shared 4-6 line dispatch-handler prologue as near-dup across many handlers.
false_positives.fix_proposal: #056: treat a repeated short prologue that is immediately followed by divergent bodies as idiom, not clone. Concretely: require the matched window to contain >=2 distinct 'effectful' statements after stripping the fixed signature + the early-return guard chain; or add a per-file 'handler family' suppressor when N>=5 functions share an identical signature and only the leading guard block matches (line-similarity of the *tail* below threshold).

false_positives.what_happened: the option/type_option structs (CrossTypeOption, CrossOption, CoverPointOption, CoverPointTypeOption, CoverGroupTypeOption) repeat the same field set with identical default initializers (weight=1; goal=100; at_least=1; comment=...; per the LRM §19.10 parallel option model). A near-dup detector flags the repeated field/initializer runs as cloned blocks.
false_positives.fix_proposal: #056: exclude pure declarative struct/enum bodies (only member declarations with initializers, no statements/control flow) from clone scoring, or down-weight windows whose tokens are exclusively type+identifier+default-literal with no operators/calls. These parallel config-struct families are a deliberate data model, not copy-paste logic.

cycle.desc: no include cycle: archcheck --graph reports sccs_cyclic=0, largest_scc=1 over 2766 nodes / 6410 edges
cycle.evidence: src/ tree is layered (lexer -> parser -> elaborator -> simulator); no back-edge include closing a cycle was found. Matches CORPUS_CHECK_DETAIL hint (циклы=0).
